title: (patch): Migrate the quest payout transaction based on the GITHUB ID of the user (assignee / creator)
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Bulletproof Quest Rewards
gist.blurb: Fixed a sneaky bug where changing your GitHub username mid-quest could mess up your Pollen reward. We now track payouts by your immutable GitHub ID, so your credits always find their way home.
gist.summary: Migrated the quest payout transaction system to use immutable GitHub IDs instead of usernames for database lookups and idempotency keys.
gist.impact: Contributors will reliably receive their Pollen rewards for completing quests, even if they change their GitHub username before the payout is processed.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee stamping a shiny Pollen coin with an ID badge, representing the shift to immutable GitHub IDs for reliable quest payouts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot stamping a shiny golden Pollen coin with a sturdy ID badge. A retro computer monitor in the background shows a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
